positive: A maximalist botanical pattern featuring intertwined tropical foliage, detailed jungle leaves, and stylized exotic blossoms in a repeating tessellation design. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with modern graphic illustration. Color palette is deep emerald green, sapphire blue, rich gold, and muted terracotta. Composition is highly symmetrical, forming a centralized, border-ready motif with strong negative space contrast. The artwork must be scalable and look perfect printed on fabric, with thick, clean linework and vibrant color separation. Flat vector aesthetic with photorealistic color depth.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, signatures, messy, grunge, photo-realistic photography, 3d render, bokeh, low resolution, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands
